title: quercus muehlenbergii var. humilis
intro: Quercus muehlenbergii var. humilis, also known as the little or dwarf white oak, is a variety of shrub-like oak tree native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its tannin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Quercus muehlenbergii var. humilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
